tables.name: accounts
tables.comment: Chart of accounts. Each account has a hierarchical path (Type:Product:AccountID:Address) and belongs to one of five fundamental types: Asset, Liability, Equity, Income, Expense. Amounts are stored as integers at the precision defined by exponent (e.g. -2 for pence).

columns.name: account_id
columns.comment: Specific account identifier within the product

columns.name: account_type
columns.comment: One of: Asset, Liability, Equity, Income, Expense

columns.name: address
columns.comment: Sub-address within the account (e.g. branch). 'Pending' marks pending accounts

columns.name: annual_interest_rate
columns.comment: Annual interest rate as a decimal (0.045 = 4.5%)

columns.name: created_at
columns.comment: Timestamp when the account was created

columns.name: currency
columns.comment: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. GBP, USD)

columns.name: exponent
columns.comment: Decimal exponent for amount precision (-2 = pence, -5 = high precision)

columns.name: full_path
columns.comment: Hierarchical account path, e.g. Asset:Bank:Current:Main

columns.name: id
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing primary key

columns.name: is_pending
columns.comment: True if this is a pending/suspense account

columns.name: product
columns.comment: Product category within the account type

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE accounts (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    full_path TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    account_type TEXT NOT NULL,
    product TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    account_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    address TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    is_pending INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    currency TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'GBP',
    exponent INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT -2,
    annual_interest_rate TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

tables.name: balances_live
tables.comment: Pre-computed end-of-day balance snapshots. Updated transactionally when movements are recorded via RecordMovementWithProjections. Avoids expensive SUM queries for frequently accessed balances.

columns.name: account_id
columns.comment: Account this balance belongs to (references accounts.id)

columns.name: balance
columns.comment: End-of-day balance in smallest currency unit

columns.name: balance_date
columns.comment: Date of the balance snapshot (start of day)

columns.name: id
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing primary key

columns.name: updated_at
columns.comment: When this balance was last recomputed

indexes.name: idx_balances_live_unique
indexes.def:
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_balances_live_unique
    ON balances_live(account_id, balance_date)

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE balances_live (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    account_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    balance_date TEXT NOT NULL,
    balance INTEGER NOT NULL,
    updated_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
)

tables.name: movements
tables.comment: Core transaction records. Each movement transfers an integer amount from one account to another. Movements with the same batch_id form a linked transaction (compound entry). Inspired by TigerBeetle's transfer model with code, ledger, and pending_id fields.

columns.name: amount
columns.comment: Transfer amount in smallest currency unit (integer at account exponent)

columns.name: batch_id
columns.comment: Groups related movements into a single atomic transaction

columns.name: code
columns.comment: Movement category: 0=normal, 1=interest accrual (TigerBeetle-inspired)

columns.name: description
columns.comment: Human-readable description of the movement

columns.name: from_account_id
columns.comment: Source account (references accounts.id)

columns.name: id
columns.comment: Auto-incrementing primary key

columns.name: knowledge_time
columns.comment: When the system recorded this movement (knowledge date)

columns.name: ledger
columns.comment: Partition identifier for multi-ledger setups (TigerBeetle-inspired)

columns.name: pending_id
columns.comment: Two-phase commit: references pending movement to post/void (0=N/A)

columns.name: to_account_id
columns.comment: Destination account (references accounts.id)

columns.name: user_data_64
columns.comment: Arbitrary external reference for application use

columns.name: value_time
columns.comment: When the movement economically occurred (value date)

indexes.name: idx_movements_code
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_movements_code ON movements(to_account_id, code, value_time)

indexes.name: idx_movements_from
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_movements_from ON movements(from_account_id, value_time)

indexes.name: idx_movements_to
indexes.def: CREATE INDEX idx_movements_to ON movements(to_account_id, value_time)

tables.def:
CREATE TABLE movements (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    batch_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    from_account_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    to_account_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    amount INTEGER NOT NULL,
    code INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    ledger INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    pending_id INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    user_data_64 INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    value_time TEXT NOT NULL,
    knowledge_time TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''
)
